name: Best: Chocolate Banana Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine all dry ingredients: flour, whole wheat flour, bran, skim milk powder, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
3. Mix in the mashed bananas until just combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased muffin pan lined with paper liners or lightly greased with butter.
5. Bake for 18-20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
6. Allow the muffins to cool in the pan for 5 minutes before removing them and transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
